• Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated underground maps and real-time player interaction.
  • Features a robust save system with cloud sync, admin controls, and a comprehensive upgrade shop for mining equipment.
  • Includes mobile-optimized touch controls, a minimap, and a sophisticated particle system for mining effects.
  • Utilizes MQTT for real-time multiplayer networking and IndexedDB for local save storage.
  • Offers extensive customization options including key rebinding, audio settings, and visual preferences.
    class GameEngine { constructor() { /* ... */ } update() { /* ... */ } draw() { /* ... */ } }
    class NetworkManager { constructor() { /* ... */ } connect() { /* ... */ } handleMessage() { /* ... */ } }
    class ShopSystem { constructor() { /* ... */ } buyUpgrade() { /* ... */ } updateUI() { /* ... */ } }

This web-based mining game combines procedurally generated terrain, real-time multiplayer networking, and a comprehensive upgrade system. Players can explore underground caves, mine resources, and interact with others through an MQTT-based server system. The game features both desktop and mobile controls, a robust save system with cloud sync capabilities, and a detailed shop for purchasing upgrades and consumables. Built with HTML5 Canvas for rendering and IndexedDB for local storage, it provides an engaging mining experience with social elements.
